name: Obocon, Inc.
summary: Obocon, Inc. develops and markets parking ticket writing systems, Internet payment remittance systems, and Internet industry guides in the United States and Canada. It also manufactures various equipment for field operations, including printers, chargers, mobile device keypads, and other items. The company has contracts with universities, car rental companies, municipalities, and laundry facilities. The company was formerly known as Clancy Systems International, Inc. Obocon, Inc. was founded in 1984 and is based in Denver, Colorado.
